data.body:
For the last 3 weeks I've been walking (hobbling, really) on a broken prosthetic foot. Tomorrow (Wednesday) afternoon is the big day I get a new, better foot!

Got approved for an Ottobock Maverick Xtreme. Sounds edgy, right? 😆
data.author: did:plc:lpl73t6nng4ml2oxtcbecqev

data.body:
It's made of a fiberglass material which is supposed to be more durable than the carbon fiber foot I have now. Even has a small shock absorber built in! Should be much easier to walk on.

Thankfully not as expensive as the socket replacement I had to have a year ago. Tax return should cover it! 😁
